PLUMBER’S COLD CALLING SCRIPT
Hi is __________________ there?
Hey 	________________! 	_________________________ 	calling 	from 	Locella 	Group? 	In 	La 	Jolla,
California? How’s it going today?
Great! Now, _____________________, you’ve probably heard of Locella Group. We’re one of the
fastest growing customer referral networks in America—working with plumbers, in all fifty
states, to help them literally explode their business.
Now, the reason for the call today is, right now, we have over a hundred new customers,
each week, right in _______________________, and we’re looking for two local plumbers to send
the business to. Are you interested?
Okay, great! Just a couple of quick questions, to make sure you qualify:
1) You are a licensed plumber, correct?
2) Do you own your own business or do you work for someone else?
3) How many years have you been in business?
4) And how are things going for you right now?
5) How do you get most of your customers? Word of mouth? Referral? Y‐Pages?
6) How about the Internet? Have you ever done any advertising there? How was
your experience? Did it work for you? Why not? What was wrong with it? What
would you change about the program if you could?
7) Have you worked with any other referral companies in the past, like Service Magic?
8) Given your current workload, how many new customers could you handle each
week? Just a ballpark?
9) And if I could deliver you those customers, what kind of advertising budget would
you be willing to work with? $300 to $500? $500 to $1000? $1000+?
10)Do you have a website I can look at?
Okay, great! Well, based on everything you just said to me, this is definitely a perfect fit for
you. If you have sixty seconds, I’d like to share the program with you. You got a minute?
See, what we do here at Locella is get your phone ringing with a flood of new customers,
through a strategic alliance we have with Google. So, basically, when anyone in a fifty‐mile
radius of you goes online and searches for a plumber, you show up right on page one—so
they find you, instead of your competitor. Sound like something you’re interested in?
Okay, great! What I’ll do is email you some information on the program, and then get back
to you in a day or so to discuss things in more detail. Sound good?
Okay, great! What’s your best email address to send the info to?
And is this your cell phone I’m calling? (If not, get their cell number.) What’s the best time
to usually get you, mornings or evenings? And how are afternoons? Is this the best number
to call you on?
Okay, great! I’ll send that info to you right now, and we’ll talk in a few days.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
